title: carex paradoxa subsp. teretiuscula
intro: Carex paradoxa subsp. teretiuscula, also known as the twisted sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex paradoxa subsp. teretiuscula include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its possible use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its rhizomes can be dried and used in herbal preparations, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
